chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-131 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.05.2020 Ms. Kaneez Fatima advocate for applicant along with applicant. Mr. Imran Ali Nahyoon associate of Mr. Anees-ur-Rehman Siddiqui advocate for private respondents. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G. along with ASI Kashif Khan P.S A-Section Latifabad, Hyderabad. -.-.-. ASI Kashif Khan P.S A-Section Latifabad, Hyderabad, has filed a report in terms of last order which essentially shows that there is a dispute of civil nature between the parties who are cousins inter se and are co- owners of the disputed premises. It appears that applicant is residing on the ground floor whereas private respondents are residing on the first floor of the same premises. There was a joint staircase leading to roof of the house used by both the parties which the applicant alleges has been closed by private respondents. In the inquiry conducted by S.H.O P.S A-Section Latifabad, Hyderabad, this fact has been verified. Both the parties have consented that the passage which was otherwise open for both the parties for their use and has been subsequently blocked will be opened in presence of police party of P.S A- Section Latifabad, Hyderabad, and the structure of the building to that extent would be restored to the same position. However, for further remedy or resolution of dispute, both the parties will approach the civil court. Accordingly, in the terms as stated above this Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
